categories.description: High-star repositories actively maintained this week

repos.description: A collective list of free APIs

repos.description: :books: Freely available programming books

repos.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

repos.name: developer-roadmap
repos.description: Interactive roadmaps, guides and other educational content to help developers grow in their careers.

repos.name: awesome-python
repos.description: An opinionated list of Python frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources

repos.name: awesome-selfhosted
repos.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

repos.name: react
repos.description: The library for web and native user interfaces.

repos.name: linux
repos.description: Linux kernel source tree

repos.name: superpowers
repos.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

repos.name: ECC
repos.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repos.name: javascript-algorithms
repos.description: 📝 Algorithms and data structures implemented in JavaScript with explanations and links to further readings

repos.name: tensorflow
repos.description: An Open Source Machine Learning Framework for Everyone

repos.name: hermes-agent
repos.description: The agent that grows with you

repos.name: n8n
repos.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

repos.name: ohmyzsh
repos.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.

repos.name: vscode
repos.description: Visual Studio Code

repos.name: AutoGPT
repos.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

repos.name: Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
repos.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

repos.name: flutter
repos.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

categories.label: New This Month
categories.description: Repositories created in the last 30 days gaining traction

repos.name: odysseus
repos.description: Self-hosted AI workspace.

repos.name: ponytail
repos.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

repos.name: sdk-js
repos.description: JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for building Astrid OS capsules. Companion to unicity-astrid/sdk-rust.

repos.name: open-code-review
repos.description: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

repos.name: defending-code-reference-harness
repos.description: Skills for threat modeling, scanning, triage, patching, plus an autonomous scanning harness you can /customize

repos.name: OpenLogi
repos.description: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.

repos.name: ian-xiaohei-illustrations
repos.description: 中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成 Skill | 16:9 白底手绘 | 少量红橙蓝批注 | Codex Skill

repos.name: improve
repos.description: Use your most capable model to audit your codebase and write plans for cheaper models to execute.

repos.name: bumblebee
repos.description: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises.

repos.name: chinese-buy-us-stock-guide
repos.description: 美股指南

repos.name: Kun
repos.description: AI agent workspace with Code and Write modes built into your application.

repos.name: gsd-core
repos.description: Git. Ship. Done - Core

repos.name: Agent-Learning-Hub
repos.description: AI Agent 学习路线与资料库收集

repos.name: guizang-social-card-skill
repos.description: 🪧 Claude Code / Codex skill — generate Xiaohongshu carousels & WeChat 21:9+1:1 cover pairs. Editorial × Swiss visual systems, 28 layouts, 10 themes, single-file HTML → PNG. 小红书图文 + 公众号封面对

repos.name: PilotDeck
repos.description: Task-oriented AI Agent productivity platform

repos.name: html-video
repos.description: Programmatic video for coding agents — HTML to video on your laptop. Turn HTML, CSS & data into real MP4s with pluggable render engines, 21 templates, AI soundtrack. Apache-2.0, no per-render fees. An official project by the Open Design team.

repos.name: PaperSpine
repos.description: PaperSpine is a motivation-driven skill for learning from strong academic papers, building a paper’s central argument, and rewriting manuscripts through evidence-aware blueprints, revision matrices, and LaTeX-safe audits.

repos.name: MisoTTS
repos.description: Miso TTS is an 8 billion, highly emotive text-to-speech model
